# etielle

> A declarative, type-safe Python DSL for mapping complex nested JSON to relational database schemas

## Docs

### API Reference

#### Classes
> Main classes provided by the package

- [AddPolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/AddPolicy.html)
- [AppendPolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/AppendPolicy.html)
- [CallableChunkSource](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/CallableChunkSource.html): Build chunks from a caller-supplied factory (tests and advanced callers)
- [ConstructorBuilder](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.html): Simplified builder for classes that accept keyword arguments in their constructor
- [ExtendPolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ExtendPolicy.html)
- [FirstNonNullPolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FirstNonNullPolicy.html)
- [GroupByChunkSource](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/GroupByChunkSource.html): Group consecutive records that share a key into one chunk each
- [InstanceBuilder](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.html)
- [KeyCompleteFlushStrategy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/KeyCompleteFlushStrategy.html): Default streaming strategy: plain insert/flush, no cross-chunk merge
- [MaxPolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MaxPolicy.html)
- [MergePolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MergePolicy.html)
- [MinPolicy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MinPolicy.html)
- [OneRecordPerChunkSource](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/OneRecordPerChunkSource.html): Wrap an iterable of JSON roots; each root becomes its own chunk
- [PipelineBuilder](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.html): Fluent builder for E→T→L pipelines
- [PreSegmentedChunkSource](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PreSegmentedChunkSource.html): Pass an already-segmented iterable of chunks through unchanged
- [PydanticBuilder](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.html)

#### Dataclasses
> Dataclass definitions

- [Chunk](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/Chunk.html): A key-complete batch of JSON roots to map together
- [Context](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/Context.html): Runtime context while traversing the JSON structure
- [CoreField](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/CoreField.html): Field(name: 'str', transform: 'Transform[Any]')
- [Field](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/Field.html): A field that will be persisted to the output table
- [FieldSpec](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FieldSpec.html): FieldSpec(selector: Union[str, Callable[[+T], Any]], transform: Callable[[etielle.core.Context], Any])
- [FlushCompleted](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FlushCompleted.html): Emitted when flush completes for a table (or batch)
- [FlushContext](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FlushContext.html): Inputs for a flush at a component boundary
- [FlushFailed](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FlushFailed.html): Emitted when an entire batch/table flush fails
- [FlushStarted](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FlushStarted.html): Emitted when flush begins for a table
- [InstanceEmit](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceEmit.html): InstanceEmit(table: str, join_keys: Sequence[Callable[[etielle.core.Context], Any]], fields: Sequence[etielle.instances.FieldSpec[+T]], builder: etielle.instances.InstanceBuilder[+T], policies: Mapping[str, etielle.instances.MergePolicy] = <factory>, strict_fields: bool = True, allow_extras: bool = False, strict_mode: str = 'collect_all', temp_fields: frozenset[str] = <factory>)
- [IterationLevel](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/IterationLevel.html): Represents a single level of iteration in a traversal
- [ManyToOneSpec](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ManyToOneSpec.html): Declarative specification for a many-to-one relationship
- [MapCompleted](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MapCompleted.html): Emitted when mapping completes for a table
- [MapStarted](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MapStarted.html): Emitted when mapping begins for a table
- [MappingResult](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MappingResult.html): Unified result for both classic table rows and instance builders
- [MappingRuntimeState](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MappingRuntimeState.html): Shared mapping state across multiple roots in one chunk
- [MappingSpec](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/MappingSpec.html): MappingSpec(traversals: 'Sequence[TraversalSpec]')
- [PipelineResult](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineResult.html): Result from running a pipeline
- [TableEmit](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TableEmit.html): Describes how to produce rows for a table from a given traversal context
- [TableStats](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TableStats.html): Statistics for a single table after pipeline execution
- [TelemetryEvent](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TelemetryEvent.html): Base class for all telemetry events
- [TempField](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TempField.html): A field used only for joining/linking, not persisted
- [TraversalSpec](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TraversalSpec.html): How to reach and iterate a collection of nodes under root

#### Protocols
> Protocol / structural-typing interfaces

- [ChunkSource](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ChunkSource.html): Produces key-complete chunks for streaming execution
- [FlushStrategy](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/FlushStrategy.html): Defines persistence behavior at a chunk/component boundary

#### ConstructorBuilder Methods
> Methods for the ConstructorBuilder class

- [ConstructorBuilder.update](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.update.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.finalize_all](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.finalize_all.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.get](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.get.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.known_fields](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.known_fields.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.update_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.update_errors.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.finalize_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.finalize_errors.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.record_update_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.record_update_error.html)
- [ConstructorBuilder.record_finalize_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/ConstructorBuilder.record_finalize_error.html)

#### InstanceBuilder Methods
> Methods for the InstanceBuilder class

- [InstanceBuilder.update](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.update.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.finalize_all](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.finalize_all.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.get](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.get.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.errors.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.known_fields](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.known_fields.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.update_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.update_errors.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.finalize_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.finalize_errors.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.record_update_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.record_update_error.html)
- [InstanceBuilder.record_finalize_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/InstanceBuilder.record_finalize_error.html)

#### PipelineBuilder Methods
> Methods for the PipelineBuilder class

- [PipelineBuilder.goto_root](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.goto_root.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.goto](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.goto.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.each](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.each.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.build_index](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.build_index.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.map_to](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.map_to.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.link_to](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.link_to.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.backlink](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.backlink.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.load](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.load.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.load_eager](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.load_eager.html)
- [PipelineBuilder.run](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PipelineBuilder.run.html)

#### PydanticBuilder Methods
> Methods for the PydanticBuilder class

- [PydanticBuilder.known_fields](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.known_fields.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.update](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.update.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.finalize_all](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.finalize_all.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.get](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.get.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.update_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.update_errors.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.finalize_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.finalize_errors.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.record_update_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.record_update_error.html)
- [PydanticBuilder.record_finalize_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticBuilder.record_finalize_error.html)

#### PydanticPartialBuilder Methods
> Methods for the PydanticPartialBuilder class

- [PydanticPartialBuilder.known_fields](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.known_fields.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.update](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.update.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.finalize_all](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.finalize_all.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.get](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.get.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.update_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.update_errors.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.finalize_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.finalize_errors.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.record_update_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.record_update_error.html)
- [PydanticPartialBuilder.record_finalize_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/PydanticPartialBuilder.record_finalize_error.html)

#### TypedDictBuilder Methods
> Methods for the TypedDictBuilder class

- [TypedDictBuilder.update](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.update.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.finalize_all](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.finalize_all.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.get](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.get.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.known_fields](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.known_fields.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.update_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.update_errors.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.finalize_errors](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.finalize_errors.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.record_update_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.record_update_error.html)
- [TypedDictBuilder.record_finalize_error](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/TypedDictBuilder.record_finalize_error.html)

#### Exceptions
> Exception classes

- [RelationshipIncompleteError](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/RelationshipIncompleteError.html): Raised when a chunk lacks a required relationship target

#### Functions
> Utility functions

- [apply](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/apply.html): Apply a function to the result of another transform
- [bind_many_to_one](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/bind_many_to_one.html): Bind child -> parent object references in-place using plain attribute assignment
- [coalesce](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/coalesce.html)
- [compute_relationship_keys](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/compute_relationship_keys.html): Compute child->parent composite keys for each ManyToOneSpec by re-walking the
- [concat](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/concat.html)
- [etl](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/etl.html): Entry point for fluent E→T→L pipelines
- [field_of](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/field_of.html): Resolve a model field name from a type-checked selector lambda
- [format_id](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/format_id.html)
- [get](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/get.html): Resolve a value relative to the current node using a dot-separated path
- [get_from_parent](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/get_from_parent.html)
- [get_from_root](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/get_from_root.html)
- [index](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/index.html)
- [key](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/key.html)
- [len_of](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/len_of.html)
- [literal](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/literal.html)
- [lookup](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/lookup.html): Look up a value in a named index
- [node](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/node.html): Return the current node value
- [parent_index](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/parent_index.html): Return the list index of an ancestor context
- [parent_key](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/parent_key.html)
- [stream](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/stream.html): Entry point for streaming/chunked E→T→L pipelines
- [transform](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/transform.html): Decorator to create custom transforms with curried arguments
- [validate_relationship_completeness](https://promptly-technologies-llc.github.io/etielle/reference/validate_relationship_completeness.html): Ensure every child lookup in the chunk resolves within chunk or eager tables
